parsed.title: Not provided
parsed.abstract_summary: Evaluation of a catalytic flow process across 42 runs to determine yield improvement over a baseline.
key_claims: The catalytic flow process increases yield compared to the baseline.
parsed.methods_summary: Randomized block design with a control arm; statistical significance set at p < 0.05.

parsed.rationale: The claim asserts improvement across 'all tested conditions,' but the evidence only specifies results for 'one control condition.'
parsed.fix: Limit the claim to the specific control condition mentioned in the abstract.
